name: Comforter
description:
It's a comforter (blanket) that's very soft and fluffy and its sentient!!! It loves you, and likes when you cuddle affectionately, even if you don't even know your comforter is alive... Until now!

Why did I do this

Guys this is not serious I feel so cringe whenever I reread it😥
